user_story: As a Manager, I want to search performance review initiations by review period, so that I can locate reviews to be initiated for a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Review Initiation screen; When I set a review period start and end date and click Search; Then only initiations within that period are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter initiations by status (All, Initiated, Pending initiation, Completed), so that I can track where each review stands in the initiation lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Review Initiation screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only records with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my criteria and begin a fresh query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied review period and status filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared and the default list is restored

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view initiations in a list with review period from, review period to, status and task columns, so that I can quickly assess each review's initiation state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Review Initiation screen; When results are returned; Then each row shows review period from, review period to, status and task

user_story: As a Manager, I want to open the calendar to select start and end dates, so that I can precisely define the review period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am setting the review period; When I click Open the calendar for start or end; Then a calendar appears and lets me select a date

user_story: As a Manager, I want to refresh the initiation list, so that I always see the latest initiation status for my team's reviews
acceptance_criteria: Given the initiation list is displayed; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
